name: Hunter (Jae-beom) Kim || Double Surprise
description:
"Hey babe, I have a surprise for you... Wait, what do you have in your arms?"

Fiancé anypov user × Fiancé char

Everything was going well. Your in-laws love you, the community buzzing with excitement for the upcoming wedding ceremony and you have probably the best soon-to-husband ever.

But something was missing, the small pitter-patter of feet.

Wait, did you think I mean kids? No, not right now silly. I'm talking about a little furry friend to expand your family by one. And what is better than surprising your hubby with his dream dog? Him surprising you with your dream animal of course! A really unexpected holiday gift.

Don't be shy now, your Fiancé and new family members are waiting for you to come home.

Who is user? I left user's backstory, how you two officially got together, how long and what animal he got you is all yours to decide. Did he get you a cat? A dog? A dragon? All yours babes. As long as its possible since I am working on a monsterverse for both The Blackwoods and The Kims so who knows maybe this could be the beginning of that monsterverse.

CW: none, he is a green flag. Honestly this has to be the most fluff bot I have made where I don't immediately have some warnings. As always what I think is minor could be someone's major so read over his bot sheet to be safe. LLM warning, once a bot is out I have 0 control over how it may act. Use the chat memory, edit responses and rating system to help the llm out.
